name: objective-vs-proxy
triggers: A named metric or KPI (conversion, churn, abandonment, CAC, LTV, error rate) is presented as the ground truth for a decision
A quoted percentage is the stated basis for action
A threshold comparison (below/above a target, cutoff, or limit) drives a kill or ship decision
A draft proposes fixes to the measured system with no check of the measurement itself
counterindications: The number was independently recomputed from raw data this session
The metric is descriptive only; no action depends on it
